bugs.error_message: Get-Content failed for apps/web/src/app/admin/conversations/[id]/page.tsx because PowerShell treated [id] as a wildcard pattern
bugs.root_cause: PowerShell -Path interprets brackets as wildcard character classes for dynamic Next.js route folder names
bugs.fix: Use Get-Content -LiteralPath for paths containing bracketed route segments

bugs.error_message: Product Design user_context_preflight.py was not found at the plugin root scripts path from the workflow note
bugs.root_cause: The user-context preflight script lives under the user-context skill directory, not the product-design plugin root scripts directory
bugs.fix: Ran python with the actual skill-local scripts/user_context_preflight.py path

bugs.error_message: Playwright CLI failed to open because Chromium distribution 'chrome' was not found at C:/Users/29408/AppData/Local/Google/Chrome/Application/chrome.exe
bugs.root_cause: The CLI defaults to the Chrome channel, but this Windows machine has Microsoft Edge installed instead of Chrome at the expected path
bugs.fix: Re-ran Playwright CLI with `open ... --browser msedge` and captured authenticated admin screenshots successfully

bugs.error_message: Function not marked async
bugs.root_cause: Function uses await but wasn't declared async
bugs.fix: Added async modifier

bugs.error_message: Failed to read planning templates from C:/Users/29408/.claude/skills/planning-with-files-zh/templates/*.md
bugs.root_cause: The planning skill is installed under .agents/skills in this environment, not under .claude/skills
bugs.fix: Located the actual skill directory with LS and re-read templates from C:/Users/29408/.agents/skills/planning-with-files-zh/templates/

bugs.error_message: prisma generate failed with EPERM when renaming query_engine-windows.dll.node on Windows
bugs.root_cause: The Prisma Windows query engine DLL was locked under node_modules/.pnpm during client regeneration, preventing prisma generate from replacing the existing binary
bugs.fix: Recorded the failure, attempted targeted cleanup, and continued validation with API typecheck/build plus focused unit tests; regeneration should be retried in an unlocked environment

bugs.error_message: pnpm test:infra:up failed with 'project name must not be empty'
bugs.root_cause: Docker Compose could not infer a valid default project name from the current Windows/Chinese-path workspace during scripted test infra startup
bugs.fix: Set COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME explicitly in test-infra.ts and removed the obsolete version field from docker-compose.test.yml

bugs.error_message: reset:test and seed:test could not resolve @prisma/client / bcryptjs from root test scripts
bugs.root_cause: The monorepo root runtime did not expose database package dependencies to tsx scripts executed from the workspace root
bugs.fix: Ran DB-touching scripts through packages/database and resolved Prisma/bcrypt dependencies from that package scope

bugs.error_message: seed:test failed with P2023 invalid UUID for fixture ids like t-ecommerce-001
bugs.root_cause: Legacy demo fixtures still use short string ids while the Prisma schema now requires UUID values for tenants, users, conversations, leads, and related foreign keys
bugs.fix: Added stable UUID mapping for fixture ids and switched nullable relations to optional UUID conversion before seeding

bugs.error_message: module-boundaries.test.ts timed out importing heavy Nest modules
bugs.root_cause: The contract test used runtime module imports and reflection, which made a simple architecture assertion depend on heavyweight Nest module loading
bugs.fix: Rewrote the test as lightweight source-level contract assertions against knowledge.module.ts and app.module.ts

bugs.error_message: admin-web-auth-contract.test.ts flagged page copy containing 'Authorization' as a bearer-token violation
bugs.root_cause: The regex matched any Authorization/Bearer text in source files, including harmless UI copy, instead of only dangerous auth header/token usage
bugs.fix: Tightened the assertions to match localStorage usage, Authorization headers, and Bearer token patterns only

bugs.error_message: sidecar-auth.test.ts failed under validate:release because test infra env overrode the expected shared token
bugs.root_cause: The unit test only set SIDECAR_SHARED_TOKEN while the client prefers RAG_SIDECAR_SHARED_TOKEN when present in the surrounding process environment
bugs.fix: Set both SIDECAR_SHARED_TOKEN and RAG_SIDECAR_SHARED_TOKEN explicitly inside the test before constructing the clients

bugs.error_message: Sidecar health contract exposed incomplete fallback/capability state and mixed snake_case with camelCase expectations
bugs.root_cause: The Python sidecar returned raw health fields without an explicit parser/graph/vector capability summary, while TypeScript callers and tests depended on a normalized camelCase contract
bugs.fix: Expanded sidecar /health to report parser_mode, graph_mode, capabilities, and vector health; normalized snake_case/camelCase fields in PythonSidecarClient.health()

bugs.error_message: Juguang integration settings logic was duplicated across admin settings routes and drift-prone
bugs.root_cause: The overview settings page, Xiaohongshu integration page, and dedicated Juguang page each kept separate account types, form mapping, webhook URL building, and CRUD calls
bugs.fix: Centralized integration contracts/helpers in apps/web/src/app/admin/settings/integrations/shared.ts and migrated the Juguang page to reuse the shared layer

bugs.error_message: pnpm validate failed because workspace-tenant-isolation.test.ts still mocked prisma.conversation.update after WorkspaceService switched to updateMany
bugs.root_cause: The unit test harness drifted behind the Sprint 3 implementation change: workspace tenant-scoped mutations now call conversation.updateMany with { id, tenantId } rather than conversation.update by id
bugs.fix: Replaced the outdated Prisma mock with conversation.updateMany and updated assertions to expect tenant-scoped where clauses; reran the focused test and full pnpm validate successfully

bugs.error_message: Nest can't resolve dependencies of the AdminConversationsController (ConversationsService, ?). WorkspaceService at index [1] is not available in ConversationsModule.
bugs.root_cause: AdminConversationsController injects WorkspaceService but ConversationsModule did not import WorkspaceModule
bugs.fix: Added WorkspaceModule to ConversationsModule imports array

bugs.error_message: Admin dashboard console showed ApiError: Internal server error because /api/admin/conversations and /api/admin/leads returned 500
bugs.root_cause: The production database was missing the pending platform conversation key migration, so Prisma queries touching Conversation relations failed with P2022 on conversations.platform_user_id
bugs.fix: Applied the pending Prisma migration so conversations.platform_user_id and conversations.platform_account_id exist; verified admin conversations and leads endpoints return 200 again

bugs.error_message: New root db:ensure script failed with Prisma P1012 because DATABASE_URL was not loaded
bugs.root_cause: Root tsx scripts do not automatically inherit Prisma env loading from apps/api/.env or the workspace .env when invoked this way
bugs.fix: Updated ensure-db-migrations.ts to load root .env and apps/api/.env before invoking prisma migrate deploy; verified pnpm db:ensure passes

bugs.error_message: Conversation detail page threw ApiError: Internal server error when clicking assign-to-me
bugs.root_cause: The page sent assignedTo: 'me' to PATCH /api/admin/conversations/:id/assignment, but the backend now writes assignedTo directly and expects a real admin UUID
bugs.fix: Fetched /api/auth/me on the detail page, stored the current admin id, and sent that UUID in handleAssign; verified browser click issues PATCH successfully and conversation.assignedTo updates

bugs.error_message: Runtime ChunkLoadError: Loading chunk app/admin/login/page failed at http://localhost:3100/_next/static/chunks/app/admin/login/page.js
bugs.root_cause: A stale Next.js dev process on port 3100 was serving an out-of-date .next cache. The HTML route still returned 200, but the referenced admin/login page chunk returned 404, causing the browser ChunkLoadError.
bugs.fix: Identified the stale node process bound to 3100, stopped it, deleted apps/web/.next, restarted pnpm --filter @ai-assistant/web dev, and verified both /admin/login and the missing chunk URL return 200 again.

bugs.error_message: Web build failed after analytics redesign because page.tsx mutated render-local chart state and useMemo dependencies violated React Compiler rules
bugs.root_cause: The new donut chart implementation updated `offset` during render, and several derived datasets were wrapped in manual useMemo blocks whose dependency arrays were narrower than the compiler-inferred values
bugs.fix: Rewrote donut segment generation as immutable derived data and replaced the problematic analytics-page useMemo wrappers with plain derived constants before rerunning `pnpm --filter @ai-assistant/web build` successfully

bugs.error_message: API frequently showed connection refused after machine/service restarts and required manual restart
bugs.root_cause: API startup depended on Postgres/Redis being immediately available; when dependencies were not ready, db:ensure failed fast with Prisma P1001 and the bare Node/Nest process exited without supervision or a real readiness probe
bugs.fix: Added startup dependency waiting and db:ensure retries, introduced /api/health/ready and graceful shutdown instrumentation, and added PM2 ecosystem supervision for automatic restart

bugs.error_message: Next.js preview showed 6 net::ERR_ABORTED requests for /_next/static/css/app/layout.css and /_next/static/chunks/* on localhost:3100
bugs.root_cause: The web dev server was serving a stale/corrupted Next.js dev build cache, causing React Client Manifest and chunk resolution mismatches during admin page loads
bugs.fix: Stopped the current apps/web Next dev processes, deleted apps/web/.next, restarted pnpm --filter @ai-assistant/web dev, and verified the affected /_next/static/css and /_next/static/chunks URLs all returned 200 again

bugs.error_message: Public chat page '返回控制台' button appeared unresponsive while localhost:3100 showed net::ERR_ABORTED RSC requests
bugs.root_cause: The action relied on App Router prefetch/push inside a dev session that had recently hit stale RSC/HMR cache problems, so the route request could start without giving immediate visible feedback and looked like a dead click
bugs.fix: Changed the action to set a leaving state and use window.location.assign('/admin/dashboard') for a full-page redirect, then restarted the web dev server after clearing apps/web/.next and verified browser navigation from /chat/demo to /admin/dashboard

bugs.error_message: Next.js runtime error: Cannot find module './31.js' from apps/web/.next/server/webpack-runtime.js while rendering /admin/leads
bugs.root_cause: The web dev server was running against a stale/corrupted .next server runtime. webpack-runtime.js referenced sibling chunks as require('./31.js') even though the actual chunk existed under .next/server/chunks/31.js, causing server-side route rendering to crash.
bugs.fix: Stopped the stale node process on port 3100, deleted apps/web/.next, restarted pnpm --filter @ai-assistant/web dev, and verified /admin/leads and /admin/login return healthy HTML without the module error.
